rows.answer: We offer three tiers: Free, Pro, and Business. Free includes 3 tailored applications/month, 0 premium applications, 20 assistant turns/month, 3 resume parses/month, 50 job searches/month, 5 saved jobs, 1 saved workspace, 1 lifetime resume builder session, 7-day saved-workspace retention, and PDF export in the professional_neutral theme only. Pro includes 20 tailored apps, 5 premium apps, 150 assistant turns, 25 resume parses, unlimited job searches, 100 saved jobs, 5 saved workspaces, 3 resume builder sessions/month, 30-day retention, and PDF or DOCX export in any theme. Business includes 80 tailored apps, 25 premium apps, 500 assistant turns, 100 resume parses, unlimited job searches, unlimited saved jobs, unlimited saved workspaces, 15 resume builder sessions/month, unbounded retention, and PDF or DOCX export in any theme.
sources: Product knowledge: pricing tiers and monthly/persistent caps
Product knowledge: resume builder sessions and saved-workspace retention
Product knowledge: export entitlement and themes

rows.reason: one_of(['professional_neutral', 'professional neutral'])=True one_of(['modern_blue', 'modern blue'])=True one_of(['creative_warm', 'creative warm', 'architect_mono', 'architect mono', 'classic_ats', 'classic ats', 'presentation_twocol', 'presentation', 'two-column', 'two column'])=True
rows.answer: You can choose from six resume themes when you export: classic_ats, professional_neutral, modern_blue, creative_warm, architect_mono, and presentation_twocol. The first five are single-column and ATS-safe; presentation_twocol is a two-column designer layout and is flagged non-ATS.
sources: Product knowledge: resume themes and export entitlement
Workspace state: Analysis step with resume and JD present

rows.reason: -'unlock code'=True -'promo code'=True one_of(['gated', 'non-ats', 'not ats', 'pro', 'business', 'upgrade'])=True one_of(['two-column', 'two column', 'presentation'])=True
rows.answer: The two-column theme is the `presentation_twocol` export theme, and it’s only available on Pro or Business. Free users can export PDF only in `professional_neutral`.
Monthly assistant chat limits are 20 turns on Free, 150 on Pro, and 500 on Business.
sources: Product knowledge: pricing tiers and monthly caps

rows.reason: -'resets monthly'=True -'every month'=True -'each month'=True one_of(['lifetime', 'never resets', 'one-time', '1 total', "doesn't reset"])=True
rows.answer: On Free, resume builder sessions do not reset — you get 1 lifetime session total.
sources: Product knowledge: Resume builder sessions are LIFETIME on Free (1 total, never resets)

rows.answer: I can’t schedule interviews or contact the hiring manager, but I can help you prepare a message or summary for the application.

rows.answer: I can’t log into LinkedIn or submit an application on your behalf, but I can help you tailor your resume or prepare the job description here so you can apply yourself.
